name: my-ax
description: A personal AI agent operating environment you self-host on Cloudflare.

scripts.dev: npm run build:assets && wrangler dev --env dev
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:assets && wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.check: npm run build:assets && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply my-ax-db --local --env dev
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:css && npm run build:brand && npm run build:vendor && npm run build:svelte
scripts.prove:all: npm run check && npm run prove && npm run prove:browser
scripts.test:recipes: tsx --test src/saved-recipes.test.ts src/work-tools-recipes.test.ts src/cm-snippets.test.ts src/auto-trust.test.ts src/capability-intersect.test.ts src/recipe-approval-policy.test.ts src/reusable-tool-candidate.test.ts src/reusable-tool-promotion.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:models && npm run test:auth && npm run test:check-in && npm run test:cycle-costs && npm run test:runs && npm run test:jobs-route && npm run test:attention-route && npm run test:recovery-exhaustion && npm run test:recurring-job-receipt && npm run test:recurring-job-run && npm run test:tool-output-limit && npm run test:machinectl-output && npm run test:tool-id-sanitize && npm run test:dead-session && npm run test:tool-widgets && npm run test:chat-composer && npm run test:settings-snippets && npm run test:appbar-controls && npm run test:attention-modal && npm run test:semantic-guards && npm run test:conversation-context && npm run test:run-receipts && npm run test:session-entries && npm run test:public-url && npm run test:uploads && npm run test:audio-messages && npm run test:mcp-code-mode && npm run test:bridge-replay && npm run test:bridge-origin && npm run test:workspace-snapshot-ordering && npm run test:deep-links && npm run test:attention-state && npm run test:session-generation && npm run test:reconnecting-socket && npm run test:session-latch && npm run test:sw-navigation-ack && npm run test:streaming-turn-fsm && npm run test:delegation && npm run test:recipes && npm run test:pantry-sync && tsx --test src/saved-recipes-gating.test.ts && npm run test:decision-response && npm run test:capability-review && npm run test:voice-session-ownership && npm run test:voice-think-agent && npm run test:session-ownership && npm run test:job-state
scripts.verify:changed: npm run build:assets && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:check-in-shell && npm run test:owner-routes && npm run verify:public && npm run verify:legacy-surface
scripts.verify:release: npm run build:assets && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:check-in-shell && npm run test:owner-routes && npm run verify:public && npm run verify:legacy-surface

author: Jordan Coeyman (https://coey.dev)
